name: Wellness
description: A Hyperion SMG that tightens up the longer you hold the trigger and always spawns with a slag Maliwan barrel. That fixed element gives it stronger status chance and damage over time than standard parts, while a matching Maliwan grip can push those strengths even further. Even at lower rarities, its dependable slag application can make it worth carrying for a long time.
notes: Related Hyperion SMGs with fixed-element Maliwan barrels include Backburner for incendiary, Cooler for cryo, Storm for shock, and Weisenheimer for corrosive. It appears at green rarity or above and drops randomly from suitable world-drop sources.
